name: zclass_clear_damage_handler
description: zClass_Node::ClearDamageHandler recursively clears a shared damage handler, clears the hit-callback node flag when needed, frees the handler, and returns zero.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ClearDamageHandler@zClass_Node@@YIHPAUzClass_NodePartial@@@Z at 0x4b2630 still fails: 38 unmasked mismatches, 16 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 62 bytes, VC object symbol size 80 bytes.

Reviewed difference is source-shape drift in damage-handler slot access and imported free call spelling: original reads the node free-list damageHandler slot directly, while current source factors that access through DamageHandlerRef. The native smoke verifies recursive handler assignment/clear, hit flag clearing, free path, and null-node behavior.
